# Perl regular expressions for paths that are to be ignored.  This file must not
# contain any blank lines, or all files will be excluded.
(?:^|/)\.gitmodules$
(?:^|/)go\.mod$
(?:^|/)go\.sum$
# configuration for check-spelling itself
^\.github/actions/spelling/
# dependabot configuration has lots of URLs and other non-spell-checkable things.
^\.github/dependabot\.yml$
